{"society_power": 3.5, "state_power": 7.5, "society_change": -3.0, "state_change": 3.5, "key_event": "Napoleon's despotic Leviathan: centralization, codification, plebiscitary empire", "reasoning": "The prefectural system, Banque de France, Civil Code, Concordat, and conscription built a pervasive, professionalized state (7.5), while the coup of Brumaire, life consulate, empire, press censorship, and abolition of the Tribunate demobilized and co-opted civil society down to a weak, easily-suppressed level (3.5)."}
